dataset_policy: Use datasets only according to their licenses/terms. Do not treat graphology labels as scientific ground truth without independent validation.

recommended_for_mvp.name: IAM Handwriting Database
recommended_for_mvp.use: Evaluate whether prompts consistently extract objective handwriting traits across many writers.
recommended_for_mvp.license_note: Requires registration/terms review. Do not redistribute raw samples without permission.

recommended_for_mvp.name: CVL Database
recommended_for_mvp.use: Test full-page scan handling, writer diversity, and visual trait stability.

recommended_for_mvp.name: RIMES
recommended_for_mvp.use: Test document-layout and multi-line handwriting extraction.

recommended_for_mvp.name: KHATT
recommended_for_mvp.use: Test non-Latin script behavior and avoid Latin-only assumptions.

recommended_for_mvp.name: Bentham / READ historical handwriting collections
recommended_for_mvp.use: Stress-test scan quality, ink/paper artifacts, older scripts.

graphology_or_personality_labeled_leads.name: Kaggle graphology / handwriting personality datasets
graphology_or_personality_labeled_leads.type: community datasets, often small and inconsistently labeled
graphology_or_personality_labeled_leads.use: Only exploratory prompt testing; never claim scientific validity from these labels alone.
graphology_or_personality_labeled_leads.quality_warning: Labels may be subjective graphology categories rather than validated Big Five/personality instruments. Audit carefully before use.

graphology_or_personality_labeled_leads.name: Handwriting + Big Five self-report collection to be built in-product
graphology_or_personality_labeled_leads.use: Best path for empirical validation: collect writing samples plus standardized questionnaire scores with explicit consent.
graphology_or_personality_labeled_leads.quality_warning: Requires consent, privacy policy, demographic bias checks, and correlation/evaluation reporting.
